extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and extension management

extDescription.message: Find and save useful web tools in one place
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store

tabOnline.description: Label for the online search tab

searchPlaceholderOnline.description: Placeholder text in the search input when on the online tab

searchPlaceholderBookmarks.description: Placeholder text in the search input when on the bookmarks tab

searchAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the search input

statusSearching.description: Status text shown while a search is in progress

statusSearchToDiscover.description: Status text shown before the user types a query

statusNoResults.description: Status text when a search returns zero results

statusResultsFound.description: Status text showing how many results were found (plural)

statusResultFound.description: Status text when exactly one result is found (singular)

statusLoading.description: Status text shown while bookmarks are loading

statusSavedBookmarks.description: Label shown after the bookmark count (plural)

statusSavedBookmark.description: Label shown after the bookmark count (singular)

emptyOnlinePrompt.message: Type a query to search tools online.
emptyOnlinePrompt.description: Placeholder message in the online tab before searching

emptyNoToolsFound.message: No tools found for your query.
emptyNoToolsFound.description: Message shown when a search returns no matching tools

emptyBookmarksNone.description: Message shown when the user has no bookmarks

emptyBookmarksNoMatch.description: Message shown when the bookmark filter matches nothing

emptyBookmarksCta.message: Search online and bookmark tools here.
emptyBookmarksCta.description: Call-to-action shown below the empty bookmarks message

showMore.description: Button to expand a tool description

showLess.description: Button to collapse a tool description

removeBookmark.description: Accessible label for the remove-bookmark button

addBookmark.description: Accessible label for the add-bookmark button
